arts.ttl: Real Madrid or Barcelona? Dortmund boss drawn on which La Liga giant was tougher UCL opponent
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund head coach Nuri Şahin was today asked for his take on which of Spanish football’s two leading clubs represents a tougher opponent. Dortmund, for their part, have been…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid & Atlético Madrid stars included in Champions League Team of the Week
arts.sum: Leading figures at Spanish football giants Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid have both been named as part of the latest UEFA Champions League Team of the Week. This of course…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid delighted with improvement in defender after shaky start to Bernabeu career
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has been forced to trust a number of Real Madrid’s second string players in recent weeks, as their injuries continue to make a large impact on his selections. One of the beneficiaries has been left-back Fran Garcia, who has now put together a run of 5 starts in 7 games.
